AL.title: Report to Alabama Parole Officer
AL.description: VERIFY: Report to your Alabama supervising officer within 24 hours of release. Missed report = warrant.

AL.title: Get Alabama state ID
AL.description: VERIFY: Obtain a Alabama state-issued photo ID. Required for all downstream benefits + employment applications.

AL.title: Apply for Alabama SNAP (food assistance)
AL.description: VERIFY: Apply for SNAP through Alabama social services. Drug felony restrictions vary — check state rule.

AL.title: Apply for Alabama Medicaid
AL.description: VERIFY: Apply for Alabama Medicaid. Covers mental health + substance use treatment.
